subcodes.first_line: O thou who circlest round the Ka'bih of divine knowledge! For some time now in these regions, in the blessed Spot and its surroundings and vicinity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طائف کعبه عرفان چندیست که در این صفحات در بقعه مبارکه و اطراف آن و ماحول
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @call to action
